title: agrostis keniensis
intro: Agrostis keniensis, commonly known as African bentgrass, is a perennial grass species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Agrostis keniensis include its potential to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Agrostis keniensis may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
